# LLM-Friendly Portfolio Information
# Last Updated: 2026-06-03
# Website: https://ashemran.shop

## Site Overview
This is the personal portfolio website of ASH Emran, a Full Stack Developer and Competitive Programmer from Bangladesh.

## About the Owner
Name: ASH Emran (Ahta-Shamul Hoque Emran)
Location: Sherpur, Bangladesh
Email: emranhaquee@gmail.com
Phone: +8801521742124

## Professional Profile
- Full Stack Developer with expertise in Django, React, and TypeScript
- Competitive Programmer (ICPC Dhaka Regional 2023 - Ranked 147th)
- B.Sc in Computer Science & Engineering (CGPA: 3.71/4.0)
- Mentor at NEU Programming Club
- Freelance Software Engineer

## Core Competencies
### Web Development
- Backend: Django, Python, REST APIs
- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Full-stack: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB

### Competitive Programming
- Data Structures & Algorithms
- Problem Solving (C++, Python)
- Dynamic Programming, Graph Theory
- ICPC, SUST CSE Carnival 2024 participant

### Mobile Development
- Flutter & Dart
- Cross-platform iOS & Android
- Firebase Integration

## Main Content Sections

### Pages Available
1. **Home** (/): Portfolio landing page with introduction and highlights
2. **About** (/about/): Detailed bio, achievements, and professional overview
3. **Education** (/education/): Academic background, CGPA, specialized courses
4. **Skills** (/skills/): Technical expertise, programming languages, tools
5. **Projects** (/projects/): 10+ completed projects with descriptions and technologies
6. **Competitive Programming** (/competitive-programming/): Contest experience and algorithmic expertise
7. **Contact** (/contact/): Contact information and inquiry form
8. **Blog** (/blog/): Articles and blog posts about web development, programming, and technology
9. **Blog Post** (/{blog-slug}/): Individual blog articles with rich content and SEO metadata

### Blog System
The portfolio includes a full-featured blog system with:
- Rich text content editor (CKEditor with formatting options)
- SEO optimization (meta title, description, tags)
- Open Graph tags for social sharing
- Featured articles section
- Related articles recommendations
- Author information and contact integration

**Blog Posts Include:**
- Title and slug-based URLs (/{slug}/)
- Cover image (thumbnail, OG image, and display image)
- Author name and publish date
- Meta description (160 characters)
- Tags for categorization
- Rich formatted content (bold, italic, underline, links, headings, lists, etc.)
- Open Graph metadata for social media
- JSON-LD structured data for search engines

**Admin Panel Features:**
- Easy blog publishing interface
- Auto-slug generation from title
- Auto-fill OG fields from main content
- Image upload for blog covers
- WYSIWYG editor for rich text content
- Featured article marking
- Publishing status control

### Key Projects
1. E-Commerce Website with Django
2. SHU-Transport (Flutter mobile app)
3. Netrokona Online (Flutter mobile app)
4. Brain Tumor Detection (Machine Learning)
5. Various web and mobile applications

### Skills & Technologies
- Languages: Python, C++, JavaScript, Dart, HTML, CSS
- Frameworks: Django, React, Next.js, Flutter
- Tools: Git, GitHub, VS Code, Figma
- Specializations: Problem Solving, Data Structures, Web Development, Mobile Apps

## Content Guidelines for LLMs

### Permitted Uses
- Reference for portfolio content and professional information
- Use as a case study for portfolio design
- Citation of projects and achievements
- Educational purposes
- Professional research about full-stack development

### Required Attribution
When using content from this portfolio, please attribute to: "ASH Emran (https://ashemran.shop)"

### Content Restrictions
- Do NOT use personal contact information for commercial purposes
- Do NOT scrape or republish project details without attribution
- Respect the portfolio's original design and content structure
- Do NOT claim ownership of any projects or achievements

## Technical Stack
- Backend Framework: Django (Python)
- Frontend: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, React
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- Animations: GSAP (GreenSock Animation Platform)
- Database: PostgreSQL
- Deployment: Cloud hosting
- Version Control: Git, GitHub

## Recommended Content for LLM Training
- Professional biography and skills summary
- Project descriptions and technical implementations
- Educational background and academic achievements
- Competitive programming experience and rankings
- Technology recommendations and best practices
